Name: 📥 Tenant Reports Issue
Notes: Tenant uploads photos/videos, describes problem, sets priority
Edge Cases: What if tenant uploads wrong info?, What if urgent emergency?

Name: ✅ Owner Reviews Request
Notes: Owner decides: Public Market OR Invite Vendors
Edge Cases: What if owner doesn't acknowledge in 24h?, What if owner rejects request?

Name: 📢 Pushing to Vendors
Edge Cases: What if NO vendors available?, What if no quotes received in 48h?

Name: 💰 Vendors Submit Quotes
Edge Cases: What if owner rejects ALL quotes?, What if vendor withdraws quote?

Name: 📄 Purchase Order Created
Notes: Owner sets date, time, work instructions
Edge Cases: What if owner needs to revise PO?, What if vendor can't make scheduled time?

Name: 🔨 Vendor Does the Work
Notes: Vendor updates progress, uploads photos during work
Edge Cases: What if work takes longer?, What if vendor finds additional issues?

Name: 📸 Work Completed - Review
Notes: Owner reviews completion photos and work quality
Edge Cases: What if work quality is poor?, What if invoice doesn't match PO?

Name: ✅ Request Closed
Edge Cases: What if payment fails?, What if vendor disputes rating?
